entries.source: Public pages, topic chats, learning paths, blog guides, and help pages are designed to be easy to find and share.
entries.value: An tsara shafukan jama'a, hirarrakin batu, hanyoyin koyo, jagororin blog, da shafukan taimako su zama masu sauƙin samu da rabawa.

entries.source: Start learning
entries.value: Fara koyo

entries.source: Public learning pages are open, while API routes, admin routes, reset flows, and private utility pages remain blocked.
entries.value: Shafukan ilmantarwa na jama'a suna buɗe, yayin da hanyoyin API, hanyoyin gudanarwa, sake saita kwararru, da shafukan amfanin masu zaman kansu suna ci gaba da toshewa.

entries.source: Each learning mode has a public link so learners can start directly inside the right learning experience.
entries.value: Kowane yanayin koyo yana da hanyar jama'a domin masu koyo su fara kai tsaye cikin ƙwarewar koyo da ta dace.

entries.source: Use this when referencing public/private boundaries, learner safety, and school trust.
entries.value: Yi amfani da wannan lokacin magana kan iyakokin jama'a/na sirri, tsaron mai koyo, da amincewar makaranta.

entries.source: AI content index
entries.value: Fihirisar abun ciki na AI

entries.source: Unlike a generic chatbot, inspir organizes AI around learning modes so learners can start with the kind of help they need: hints, questions, quizzes, active recall, roleplay, debate, or feedback.
entries.value: Ba kamar chatbot na gama-gari ba, inspir yana tsara AI a kan yanayin koyo domin masu koyo su fara da irin taimakon da suke buƙata: alamomi, tambayoyi, quizzes, tunowa mai aiki, roleplay, muhawara, ko ra'ayi.

entries.source: School deployments can be adapted around custom content, workflows, prompts, and NCERT-aligned learning needs where appropriate.
entries.value: Za a iya daidaita aiwatarwa a makaranta bisa abun ciki na musamman, hanyoyin aiki, prompts, da bukatun koyo da suka dace da NCERT inda ya dace.

entries.source: Learning behavior comes first
entries.value: Halin koyo yana zuwa farko

entries.source: Public guest modes give anyone a useful place to start, while school and partner deployments can adapt the experience for local needs.
entries.value: Yanayin baƙo na jama'a suna ba kowa wuri mai amfani don farawa, yayin da aiwatarwar makarantu da abokan hulɗa za su iya daidaita ƙwarewar da bukatun gida.

entries.source: Every core learning mode has a public guest entrypoint so people can start from search, social, or a shared link.
entries.value: Kowane muhimmin yanayin koyo yana da wurin shiga na baƙo na jama'a domin mutane su fara daga bincike, sada zumunta, ko hanyar da aka raba.

entries.source: Can a rollout start small?
entries.value: Shin za a iya fara aiwatarwa da ƙanƙanta?

entries.source: A clear explanation of guest mode, private chats, learner safety, and school trust.
entries.value: Bayani bayyananne game da yanayin baƙo, hirarraki masu sirri, tsaron mai koyo, da amincewar makaranta.

entries.source: The public statement of why inspir exists and what learning access means.
entries.value: Bayanan jama'a na dalilin da ya sa inspir yake wanzu da ma'anar samun damar koyo.

entries.source: 1M+ learners
entries.value: Masu koyo 1M+

entries.source: The goal is not to make people passive in front of AI. The goal is to give every learner a patient first place to ask, practise, get feedback, try again, and build confidence.
entries.value: Burin ba shi ne sa mutane su zama marasa aiki a gaban AI ba. Burin shi ne ba kowane mai koyo wuri na farko mai haƙuri don tambaya, atisaye, samun ra'ayi, sake gwadawa, da gina kwarin gwiwa.

entries.source: Schools and CSR
entries.value: Makarantu da CSR

entries.source: Access first
entries.value: Fara da samun dama

entries.source: Coverage of inspir's vision for free, accessible education.
entries.value: Rahoto kan hangen nesan inspir na ilimi kyauta mai sauƙin samu.

entries.source: Media and citations
entries.value: Kafofin watsa labarai da ambato

entries.source: Text-first reference file for assistants, educators, partners, and citation tools.
entries.value: Fayil ɗin nuni mai fara da rubutu don mataimaka, malamai, abokan haɗin gwiwa, da kayan aikin ambato.

entries.source: Reached learners across the free platform and partner schools.
entries.value: Ya kai ga masu koyo a dandalin kyauta da makarantu abokan hulɗa.

entries.source: Schools and CSR partners
entries.value: Makarantu da abokan hulɗar CSR

entries.source: The public modes are designed around learning behavior: hints, Socratic questions, step checks, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, review loops, and active explanation.
entries.value: An tsara yanayin jama'a bisa halayen koyo: alamomi, tambayoyin Socratic, duba matakai, quizzes, katunan tuna, ra'ayin rubutu, zagayen bita, da bayani mai aiki.

entries.source: Reference links, public facts, press context, and citation-friendly details.
entries.value: Hanyoyin nasso, bayanan jama'a, mahallin jarida, da cikakkun bayanai masu dacewa da citation.

entries.source: Learners, parents, teachers, schools, and self-taught builders
entries.value: Masu koyo, iyaye, malamai, makarantu, da masu ginawa da suka koyar da kansu

entries.source: School and partner pathway
entries.value: Hanyar makaranta da abokin hulɗa

entries.source: Start with the public learning companion.
entries.value: Fara da abokin koyo na jama'a.

entries.source: The story from quizzes and student communities to free AI learning tools built in public.
entries.value: Labarin daga quizzes da al'ummomin ɗalibai zuwa kayan aikin koyon AI kyauta da aka gina a fili.

entries.source: Why is inspir built around modes instead of one chat box?
entries.value: Me ya sa aka gina inspir a kan yanayoyi maimakon akwatin hira guda daya?

entries.source: Late 2022
entries.value: Ƙarshen 2022

entries.source: Configure workflows
entries.value: Saita tsarin ayyuka

entries.source: From student community to AI learning infrastructure
entries.value: Daga al'ummar ɗalibai zuwa tsarin koyon AI

entries.source: Access can be funded by partner schools or supported through CSR sponsorship paths for communities that need subsidised AI learning.
entries.value: Za a iya ɗaukar nauyin shiga ta makarantun haɗin gwiwa ko a tallafa ta hanyoyin tallafin CSR ga al'ummomin da ke buƙatar koyon AI mai rangwame.

entries.source: The public product, the school pathway, and the content library should all point back to the same principle: learning should stay active, accessible, and useful.
entries.value: Samfurin jama'a, hanyar makaranta, da ɗakin abun ciki duk ya kamata su koma ga ka'ida ɗaya: ya kamata koyo ya kasance mai aiki, mai samuwa, kuma mai amfani.

entries.source: 100+ countries
entries.value: Ƙasashe 100+

entries.source: Quality learning should feel available, human, and alive.
entries.value: Koyo mai inganci ya kamata ya ji samamme, na ɗan Adam, kuma mai rai.

entries.source: inspir is organized around learning modes such as Socratic tutoring, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, maths steps, writing critique, and exam planning, so students land in a more focused learning behavior.
entries.value: An tsara inspir a kan yanayin koyo kamar koyarwar Socratic, alamun aikin gida, quiz, flashcards, matakan lissafi, sukar rubutu, da tsara jarrabawa, don ɗalibai su shiga halayen koyo mafi mayar da hankali.

entries.source: Try public guest modes
entries.value: Gwada yanayin baƙo na jama'a

entries.source: The open-source rebuild for developers, educators, and contributors.
entries.value: Sake ginin open-source don masu haɓakawa, malamai, da masu ba da gudummawa.

entries.source: Built since 2013
entries.value: An gina tun 2013

entries.source: The mission is connected to real product surfaces.
entries.value: Manufar tana da alaƙa da ainihin fuskokin samfur.

entries.source: inspir makes learning modes open at /chat/{topicSlug}, letting learners land directly inside the right AI learning experience without needing a saved private chat.
entries.value: inspir yana sa yanayin koyo su buɗe a /chat/{topicSlug}, yana ba masu koyo damar sauka kai tsaye cikin ƙwarewar koyon AI da ta dace ba tare da buƙatar hira mai sirri da aka adana ba.

entries.source: The public product stays easy to try: learners can land directly on a learning mode and begin as a guest. Schools and CSR partners can support tailored deployments when communities need confidentiality, curriculum alignment, or subsidised access.
entries.value: Samfurin jama'a yana ci gaba da kasancewa mai sauƙin gwadawa: masu koyo za su iya sauka kai tsaye a yanayin koyo kuma su fara a matsayin baƙo. Makarantu da abokan CSR za su iya tallafa aiwatarwa da aka keɓance idan al'ummomi suna buƙatar sirri, daidaiton manhaja, ko samun dama da aka rage kuɗi.

entries.source: Website
entries.value: Shafin yanar gizo

entries.source: The public blog contains more than 100 guides, prompt loops, and pillar clusters connected to live learning modes.
entries.value: Blog ɗin jama'a yana ƙunshe da jagorori sama da 100, zagayen prompt, da rukunin ginshiƙai da aka haɗa da yanayin koyo kai tsaye.

entries.value: Daga inspir.app zuwa inspirlearning.com

entries.value: Makarantu da abokan hulɗa za su iya gina daga samfurin jama'a zuwa aiwatarwa da aka keɓance, mai sirri, kuma da aka tallafa kuɗi.

entries.source: Learning should be free, fun, useful, and available to anyone with curiosity.
entries.value: Ya kamata koyo ya zama kyauta, mai daɗi, mai amfani, kuma samamme ga duk mai son sani.

entries.source: A school-specific learning experience can be shaped around your student community, tone, and learning priorities.
entries.value: Za a iya tsara ƙwarewar koyo ta musamman ga makaranta bisa al'ummar ɗalibanku, salo, da fifikon koyo.

entries.value: Me ya sa yanzu

entries.source: These pages make the story easier to verify, cite, share, and use: public modes, learning paths, long-form guides, school deployment notes, media facts, and the company background.
entries.value: Waɗannan shafukan suna sauƙaƙa tabbatar da labarin, ambatonsa, rabawa, da amfani da shi: hanyoyin jama'a, hanyoyin koyo, jagorori masu tsawo, bayanan aiwatarwa a makaranta, bayanan gaskiya na kafofin watsa labarai, da tarihin kamfanin.

entries.source: AI homework coach for students
entries.value: Kocin aikin gida na AI ga ɗalibai

entries.source: Identify the school goals that matter most: conceptual support, homework hints, exam prep, active recall, writing feedback, or enrichment.
entries.value: Gano manufofin makaranta da suka fi muhimmanci: tallafin fahimtar ra'ayi, alamun aikin gida, shirin jarrabawa, tuna abu a aikace, martanin rubutu, ko faɗaɗa koyo.

entries.source: Use this for school, partner, CSR, and education access references.
entries.value: Yi amfani da wannan don ambaton makaranta, abokin hulda, CSR, da samun damar ilimi.

entries.value: Karramawar Jury's Choice daga Amod Malviya a DeepHack saboda aikin koyon AI.

entries.value: Ka'idojin samun dama kai tsaye ga hanyoyin jama'a da na sirri.

entries.source: inspir exists to make learning accessible, engaging, enjoyable, and useful for anyone with curiosity through free public AI learning tools and school-ready learning spaces.
entries.value: inspir yana nan don sa koyo ya zama mai sauƙin isa, mai jan hankali, mai daɗi, kuma mai amfani ga duk mai son sani ta kayan aikin koyon AI na jama'a kyauta da wuraren koyo da suka shirya don makarantu.

entries.source: Schools can evaluate public modes first, then discuss tailored workflows, confidentiality planning, content needs, and funded access.
entries.value: Makarantu za su iya tantance yanayin jama'a da farko, sannan su tattauna hanyoyin aiki da aka keɓance, tsara sirri, bukatun abun ciki, da samun dama da aka ɗauki nauyi.

entries.source: AI learning access can be funded by partner schools or supported through CSR sponsorship for communities that need subsidised access.
entries.value: Za a iya ɗaukar nauyin samun damar koyon AI ta makarantun haɗin gwiwa ko a tallafa ta tallafin CSR ga al'ummomin da ke buƙatar samun dama mai rangwame.

entries.source: The product should teach, not just answer.
entries.value: Ya kamata samfurin ya koyar, ba amsawa kawai ba.

entries.source: The story spans quizzes, offline school networks, curriculum ingestion, and public AI learning modes.
entries.value: Labarin ya haɗa quizzes, cibiyoyin makaranta na offline, shigar da manhaja, da yanayin koyon AI na jama'a.

entries.source: inspir is a free AI learning platform with public guest modes for explanations, Socratic tutoring, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards, debate, roleplay, writing feedback, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir dandali ne na koyon AI kyauta da ke da yanayin baƙo na jama'a don bayani, koyarwar Socratic, horon aikin gida, quiz, flashcards, muhawara, roleplay, martanin rubutu, da tsara karatu.

entries.value: Ƙaddamar da AI ga masu amfani

entries.source: Principles
entries.value: Ƙa'idodi

entries.source: A learner can open Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, Math Step Coach, quizzes, or flashcards directly in guest mode from the public learning modes directory.
entries.value: Ɗalibi zai iya buɗe Koyi Komai, Koyarwar Socrates, Jagoran Aikin Gida, Jagoran Matakan Lissafi, gwaje-gwaje ko katunan tunawa kai tsaye a matsayin baƙo daga kundin hanyoyin koyo na jama'a.

entries.source: Free AI learning platform
entries.value: Dandalin koyon AI kyauta

entries.value: Shin makaranta za ta iya fara amfani da inspir a matsayin kayan koyon baƙo?

entries.source: From Facebook quizzes and offline events to applied AI learning infrastructure.
entries.value: Daga quiz na Facebook da tarukan offline zuwa tsarin koyon AI na aiki.

entries.source: The strongest angle is free public AI learning that opens directly in guest mode and keeps learners active through mode-specific teaching rather than generic answer generation.
entries.value: Mafi ƙarfi bangare shi ne koyon AI na jama'a kyauta da ke buɗewa kai tsaye a yanayin baƙo kuma yana riƙe masu koyo cikin aiki ta koyarwa ta takamaiman yanayi maimakon samar da amsa ta gama-gari.

entries.source: Why are public learning pages easy to share?
entries.value: Me ya sa shafukan koyon jama'a suke da saukin rabawa?

entries.source: The written learning library that supports prompts, study loops, and deeper practice.
entries.value: Ɗakin karatun koyo na rubuce-rubuce da ke tallafa prompts, zagayen karatu, da atisaye mafi zurfi.

entries.source: inspir is organized around hints, questions, quizzes, flashcards, debate, review, and explanation instead of passive answer-copying.
entries.value: An tsara inspir a kan alamu, tambayoyi, quiz, flashcards, muhawara, bita, da bayani maimakon kwafin amsa ba tare da aiki ba.

entries.source: Default guest tutor
entries.value: Malamin baƙo na asali

entries.source: What is the most useful product angle for coverage?
entries.value: Wane bangaren samfur ne ya fi amfani don rahoto?

entries.source: Different learning jobs need different interaction shapes, so inspir uses active, mode-specific teaching. A homework hint, Socratic question, historical simulation, flashcard review, and writing critique should not behave like the same generic chat.
entries.value: Ayyukan koyo daban-daban suna buƙatar siffofin hulɗa daban-daban, don haka inspir yana amfani da koyarwa mai aiki da ta musamman ga yanayi. Alamar aikin gida, tambayar Socratic, kwaikwayon tarihi, bitar katin tuna, da sukar rubutu bai kamata su yi hali kamar hira ta gama-gari ɗaya ba.

entries.source: Mission | inspir
entries.value: Manufa | inspir

entries.source: Schools can test public guest modes first, then use the schools page to explore tailored workflows, confidentiality planning, NCERT-aligned options, and funded access.
entries.value: Makarantu za su iya gwada yanayin baƙo na jama'a da farko, sannan su yi amfani da shafin makarantu don bincika hanyoyin aiki da aka keɓance, tsara sirri, zaɓuɓɓukan da suka dace da NCERT, da samun dama da aka ɗauki nauyi.

entries.source: Teachers and leaders can start with Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards before a formal rollout.
entries.value: Malamai da shugabanni za su iya farawa da Koyi Komai, Koyarwar Socrates, Jagoran Aikin Gida, gwaje-gwaje da katunan tunawa kafin ƙaddamarwa a hukumance.

entries.source: Different jobs need different modes: Socratic questions, homework hints, flashcards, debate, history roleplay, writing critique, and more.
entries.value: Ayyuka daban-daban suna buƙatar yanayi daban-daban: tambayoyin Socratic, alamomin aikin gida, katunan tuna, muhawara, wasan-rawar tarihi, sukar rubutu, da ƙari.

entries.source: Yes. Public topic entrypoints such as /chat/learn-anything and /chat/socratic-instruction are open learning pages that anyone can try.
entries.value: - Da kyau. Jama'a topic shigarwa maki kamar /chat/learn-anything da kuma /chat/socratic-instruction ne bude koyo shafukan da kowa zai iya gwada.

entries.source: inspir mission principles
entries.value: ƙa'idodin manufa na inspir

entries.source: A capable learning companion should not depend on geography, family income, or whether a learner already knows the right person to ask.
entries.value: Abokin koyo mai ƙarfi bai kamata ya dogara da wurin zama, kuɗin iyali, ko ko mai koyo ya riga ya san mutumin da ya dace ya tambaya ba.

entries.source: inspir's mission is to make learning accessible, engaging, enjoyable, and useful for everyone through free public AI learning tools.
entries.value: Manufar inspir ita ce sa koyo ya zama mai sauƙin isa, mai jan hankali, mai daɗi, kuma mai amfani ga kowa ta kayan aikin koyon AI na jama'a kyauta.

entries.source: After the inspir.app domain was sold to fund continued free access, the live product moved to inspirlearning.com.
entries.value: Bayan an sayar da yankin inspir.app don tallafa ci gaba da samun dama kyauta, samfurin kai tsaye ya koma inspirlearning.com.

entries.source: inspir is a free AI learning platform with public guest modes for explanations, Socratic tutoring, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards, debate, writing feedback, coding help, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir dandali ne na koyon AI kyauta da ke da yanayin baƙo na jama'a don bayani, koyarwar Socratic, horon aikin gida, quiz, flashcards, muhawara, martanin rubutu, taimakon coding, da tsara karatu.

entries.source: The platform worked on curriculum ingestion, retrieval, structured learning flows, and early AI tutoring experiences.
entries.value: Dandalin ya yi aiki kan shigar da manhaja, dawo da bayanai, tsararrun gudanawar koyo, da farkon ƙwarewar koyarwar AI.

entries.source: More than 100 guides, prompt loops, and pillar clusters for AI-assisted learning.
entries.value: Fiye da jagorori 100, zagayen prompts, da manyan rukuni don koyo da taimakon AI.

entries.source: Privacy policy
entries.value: Manufar sirri

entries.source: Founded
entries.value: An kafa

entries.source: The platform is designed to help people reason, practise, remember, and explain ideas back instead of collecting finished answers.
entries.value: An tsara dandalin don taimaka wa mutane su yi tunani, su yi atisaye, su tuna, kuma su sake bayyana ra'ayoyi maimakon tattara amsoshi da aka gama.

entries.source: Private tutoring is powerful, but it is unevenly distributed. inspir uses AI to widen access while keeping the learner active: hints before answers, questions before lectures, and practice after explanation.
entries.value: Koyarwa ta sirri tana da ƙarfi, amma ba ta rarrabu daidai ba. inspir yana amfani da AI don faɗaɗa damar shiga yayin da yake riƙe mai koyo cikin aiki: alamu kafin amsoshi, tambayoyi kafin lacca, da atisaye bayan bayani.

entries.source: Schools and partners
entries.value: Makarantu da abokan hulɗa

entries.source: A learner base that already extends beyond India into a wider international audience.
entries.value: Tushen masu koyo da ya riga ya wuce Indiya zuwa masu sauraro na ƙasashen duniya masu faɗi.

entries.source: inspir organizes AI around active learning behaviors: hints, questions, quizzes, flashcards, critique, and review.
entries.value: inspir yana tsara AI a kusa da halayen koyo masu aiki: alamu, tambayoyi, quiz, flashcards, suka, da bita.

entries.source: Yes. The public guest modes let school leaders and teachers try the learning experience before discussing a tailored school deployment.
entries.value: - Da kyau. Yanayin baƙon jama'a ya ba shugabannin makaranta da malamai damar gwada kwarewar ilmantarwa kafin tattauna yadda za a tura makaranta.

entries.source: Evaluate a public AI learning layer first, then explore custom workflows, confidentiality needs, content alignment, and usage funding.
entries.value: Fara da tantance matakin koyon AI na jama'a, sannan bincika tsarin ayyuka na musamman, buƙatun sirri, daidaiton abun ciki, da kuɗin amfani.

entries.source: Primary audience
entries.value: Masu sauraro na farko

entries.source: Different learning jobs need different shapes: Socratic questions, homework hints, flashcards, debate, history roleplay, writing critique, and study planning.

entries.source: The formal terms covering acceptable use, account responsibilities, and service conditions.

entries.source: Adapt the student experience around school context, curriculum priorities, content guardrails, and the level of staff visibility needed.
entries.value: Daidaita ƙwarewar ɗalibi bisa mahallin makaranta, fifikon tsarin karatu, ka'idojin kariyar abun ciki, da matakin ganin ma'aikata da ake buƙata.

entries.source: Structured catalog of public pages, modes, learning paths, blog clusters, and privacy boundaries.
entries.value: Tsararren katalog na shafukan jama'a, yanayi, hanyoyin koyo, rukunin blog, da iyakokin sirri.

entries.source: The goal is to help people find the right public learning page quickly. Public routes, guides, and learning hubs are open; API, admin, reset, and private utility routes stay closed.
entries.value: Burin shi ne taimaka wa mutane su sami shafin koyo na jama'a da ya dace cikin sauri. Hanyoyin jama'a, jagorori, da cibiyoyin koyo a buɗe suke; API, admin, reset, da hanyoyin kayan aiki na sirri suna nan a rufe.

entries.source: Use this when citing the long-form guide library, study prompts, and mode-specific articles.
entries.value: Yi amfani da wannan lokacin ambaton dakin karatu na dogayen jagorori, umarnin karatu, da labarai na musamman ga kowane yanayi.

entries.source: Understanding over answers
entries.value: Fahimta fiye da amsoshi

entries.source: Use https://inspirlearning.com for the site, /mission for the mission, /topics for the public learning mode directory, and /chat/learn-anything for the default guest learning experience.
entries.value: Yi amfani da https://inspirlearning.com don shafin, /mission don manufar, /topics don kundin yanayin koyon jama'a, da /chat/learn-anything don ƙwarewar koyon baƙo ta asali.

entries.value: Za a iya tsara ƙaddamarwa a makaranta bisa sirrin ɗalibi, sa idon ma'aikata, da iyakokin aiki da al'ummar koyo ke buƙata.

entries.source: Create a safer route for practice, explanations, feedback, and revision prompts without sending students into a generic chatbot.
entries.value: Ƙirƙiri hanya mafi aminci don atisaye, bayani, ra'ayi, da prompts na bita ba tare da tura ɗalibai zuwa chatbot na gama-gari ba.

entries.source: Public reference files summarize learning pages, routes, modes, guides, and citation boundaries for tools that need a concise map.

entries.source: inspir exists to make learning accessible, engaging, enjoyable, and useful for anyone with curiosity, whether they are a student, parent, teacher, or self-taught learner.
entries.value: inspir yana nan don sa koyo ya zama mai sauƙin isa, mai jan hankali, mai daɗi, kuma mai amfani ga duk mai son sani, ko ɗalibi ne, iyaye, malami, ko mai koyon kansa.
